item_text: login -> login success: user enters correct login credentials
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-001 title: successful login module: login source pages: 1,2 preconditions: user has valid login credentials (correct username and password). test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword test steps: 1. user enters "testuser" into the username field. 2. user enters "testpassword" into the password field. 3. user clicks on the login button. 4. application sends the request to the server. 5. server authenticates the user. 6. server returns a success message to the application. 7. application redirects the user to the home page. expected result: user is successfully logged in and redirected to the home page.

item_text: login -> login failure: user enters incorrect login credentials
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-002 title: incorrect login credentials module: login source pages: 1,2 preconditions: user has invalid login credentials (incorrect username or password). test data: - username: wronguser - password: wrongpassword test steps: 1. user enters "wronguser" into the username field. 2. user enters "wrongpassword" into the password field. 3. user clicks on the login button. 4. application sends the request to the server. 5. server attempts to authenticate the user. 6. server returns an error message to the application. 7. application displays an error message to the user. expected result: user is not logged in and an error message is displayed.

item_text: register -> register success: user enters valid registration information
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-register-001 title: successful registration module: register source pages: 1,2,4 preconditions: user has valid registration information (correct email, password, first name, last name). test data: - email: test@example.com - password: testpassword - first name: john - last name: doe test steps: 1. user navigates to the registration page. 2. user enters "test@example.com" into the email field. 3. user enters "testpassword" into the password field. 4. user enters "john" into the first name field. 5. user enters "doe" into the last name field. 6. user clicks on the register button. 7. application sends the request to the server. 8. server creates the user account. 9. server returns a success message to the application. 10. application redirects the user to the home page. expected result: user is successfully registered and redirected to the home page.

item_text: register -> register failure: user enters invalid registration information
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-register-002 title: invalid registration information module: register source pages: 1,2,4 preconditions: user has invalid registration information (missing fields or incorrect format). test data: - email: test - password: test - first name: john - last name: doe test steps: 1. user navigates to the registration page. 2. user enters "test" into the email field. 3. user enters "test" into the password field. 4. user enters "john" into the first name field. 5. user enters "doe" into the last name field. 6. user clicks on the register button. 7. application sends the request to the server. 8. server attempts to create the user account. 9. server returns an error message to the application. 10. application displays an error message to the user. expected result: user is not registered and an error message is displayed.
